data.content: Plan review approved. Existing CLI structure supports this cleanly: add a Doctor subcommand, reuse update-version resolution logic from update.rs, and add shell-specific completion detection/install paths. Keep completion detection explicitly heuristic in user-facing output, handle offline/version-check failures as non-fatal doctor results, and expose only the minimum update.rs helpers needed for structured status checks. Test coverage should include shell detection, temp-home completion detection/install, and doctor output/fix flows where network-independent.
